title: TravelSync
description: A premium intercity bus booking platform built with Next.js 16 and React 19. Features interactive seat maps with premium and standard cabin layouts, real-time trip search, PDF ticket generation with QR codes, and a complete booking flow from route discovery to confirmation.

title: ShareHub
description: A community-driven Android app for sharing resources within neighborhoods and organizations. Built with Kotlin and Firebase, it features user authentication, community management, resource listings with category filters, a reservation and lending system, push notifications via FCM, and real-time messaging.

title: SHIELD — Safety App
description: A privacy-focused Android safety application designed to curb male Gender-Based Violence (GBV). Features one-tap SOS alerts with GPS location sharing for quick emergency response, encrypted incident journaling with audio recording to preserve evidence, a trusted support circle for alerts, and AES-256 encrypted local storage with optional Google Drive backup. Built with Kotlin and Room database.

title: HotelOps
description: A hotel operations management system with role-based access for receptionists and housekeeping staff. Built with Node.js and Express, it features guest check-in and checkout workflows, real-time room status tracking, housekeeping task management with cleaning schedules, an occupancy dashboard with key metrics, and session-based authentication. Works fully offline with JSON-based data storage.
